name: Australia Post
description: Production-ready Australia Post shipping integration meeting full lodgement validation requirements. Supports order management, basket management (10,000 items), validation services, all product features (ATL, Safe Drop, DG), and 4 account types (eParcel, StarTrack, Same Day, On Demand). Complete workflow from validation to manifest generation.
author: Spwig

api_key.label: API Key
api_key.help_text: Your Australia Post API Key in UUID format (e.g., 601a4032-6dbd-46aa-9c6c-8c6dacca5e61) from the Developer Portal

api_password.label: API Password
api_password.help_text: Password you set when generating your API Key

account_number.label: Account Number
account_number.help_text: Your charge account number. Australia Post: 10 digits (will be left-padded with zeros). StarTrack: 8 digits (no padding needed).

account_type.label: Account Type
account_type.help_text: Select your account type for proper validation and feature support

environment.label: Environment
environment.help_text: Use Test for development with sandbox credentials

api_info.label_generation: Two-step process (create shipment, then create labels)

order_management.description: Full order management for production lodgement
order_management.create_order: Create orders from shipments (max 2,000 items per order)

basket_management.item_operations: Add, update, or delete individual items

validation_services.description: Pre-flight validation for addresses and shipments

product_features.allow_partial: Allow partial delivery for multi-item shipments

adhoc_pickups.create_pickup: Schedule pickup with time slot selection

charge_code_expiry.auto_check: Daily expiry checking via Get Accounts API
charge_code_expiry.cache_expiry_dates: Cache and track product expiry dates

two_step_labels.description: Label generation requires two API calls

rate_limiting.implementation: Token bucket algorithm with automatic waiting

account_types.description: Support for all Australia Post account types
account_types.auto_padding: Automatic account number formatting per type

api_key_format.description: API Key must be UUID format

error_codes.41001: CUSTOMER_NOT_FOUND - Location with account number not found
error_codes.41002: ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND - Account with ID not found
error_codes.41003: CONTRACT_NOT_VALID_ERROR - Contract expired or not yet valid

changes: 🐛 CRITICAL FIX: Corrected testbed URL from digitalapi-test.auspost.com.au to digitalapi.auspost.com.au/test
Implemented missing ProviderBase abstract methods for wizard compatibility
Added credential_schema property with full validation schema
Added validate_credentials method with comprehensive validation (UUID, account number, account type)
Added redact_credentials method for secure credential logging
Added cancel_label method wrapping existing void_label functionality
Added verify_webhook_signature and handle_webhook methods (not supported by API)
Updated __init__ to properly call parent class initialization
Provider now fully implements ProviderBase interface and works in shipping wizard
Removed inline CSS from setup_instructions.html to comply with design standards
Setup instructions now use consolidated wizard CSS (wizard-base.css and provider-wizard.css)
Improved consistency and maintainability of setup UI
🎉 Major release - Production lodgement validation requirements fully implemented
✨ ORDER MANAGEMENT: Create orders from shipments (PUT /orders)
✨ ORDER MANAGEMENT: Retrieve order details (GET /orders/{id})
✨ ORDER MANAGEMENT: Get order summary/manifest (GET /orders/{id}/summary)
✨ ORDER MANAGEMENT: Automatic order splitting for >2,000 items
✨ ORDER MANAGEMENT: Order size validation and tracking
✨ BASKET MANAGEMENT: Track basket size (10,000 item limit)
✨ BASKET MANAGEMENT: Get shipment details (GET /shipments/{id})
✨ BASKET MANAGEMENT: List and filter shipments (GET /shipments)
✨ BASKET MANAGEMENT: Update shipments before order creation (PUT /shipments/{id})
✨ BASKET MANAGEMENT: Delete items from shipments
✨ BASKET MANAGEMENT: Update individual items
✨ BASKET MANAGEMENT: Basket overflow warnings at 8,000 items
✨ VALIDATION: Validate Australian suburbs and postcodes (POST /postcode/validate)
✨ VALIDATION: Pre-flight shipment validation (POST /shipments/validate)
✨ VALIDATION: Lookup address serviceability (POST /serviceability)
✨ VALIDATION: Automatic validation in shipment workflow
✨ VALIDATION: Validation result caching for performance
✨ PRODUCT FEATURES: Authority To Leave (ATL) support
✨ PRODUCT FEATURES: Safe Drop with location instructions
✨ PRODUCT FEATURES: Signature on Delivery options
✨ PRODUCT FEATURES: Allow Partial Delivery for multi-item shipments
✨ PRODUCT FEATURES: Custom delivery instructions
✨ PRODUCT FEATURES: Dangerous Goods declarations and validation
✨ PRODUCT FEATURES: SSCC barcoding support (18-digit)
✨ PRODUCT FEATURES: Returns shipment handling
✨ PRODUCT FEATURES: Product-feature compatibility matrix
✨ ENHANCED PRICING: Get individual shipment pricing (POST /prices/items)
✨ ENHANCED PRICING: Calculate ETA (POST /eta)
✨ ENHANCED PRICING: Price comparison across services
✨ ADHOC PICKUPS: Schedule pickups with time slot selection (POST /pickups)
✨ ADHOC PICKUPS: Pickup address validation
✨ ADHOC PICKUPS: Pickup cancellation support
✨ ACCOUNT TYPES: Full support for eParcel (10-digit, prefix 2)
✨ ACCOUNT TYPES: Full support for StarTrack Premium/Express (8-digit)
✨ ACCOUNT TYPES: Full support for Same Day Services (10-digit, prefix 3)
✨ ACCOUNT TYPES: Full support for On Demand (10-digit, prefix 1)
✨ EXPIRY MANAGEMENT: Automatic charge code expiry checking
✨ EXPIRY MANAGEMENT: Expiry date caching and warnings
✨ EXPIRY MANAGEMENT: Daily expiry validation via Get Accounts API
🧪 TESTING: Comprehensive integration tests for all 4 account types
🧪 TESTING: Complete workflow tests (validate → basket → order → labels → track)
🧪 TESTING: All product feature testing (ATL, Safe Drop, DG, etc.)
🧪 TESTING: Error scenario and recovery testing
🧪 TESTING: Reusable test fixtures and mock data
🧪 TESTING: Testbed API integration (test accounts configured)
📚 DOCUMENTATION: Complete workflow documentation
📚 DOCUMENTATION: Feature configuration guide
📚 DOCUMENTATION: Order and basket management guide
📚 DOCUMENTATION: Validation services usage
📚 DOCUMENTATION: Multiple account type handling
📚 DOCUMENTATION: Limits and constraints reference
🔧 CONFIGURATION: Account type selection in credentials
🔧 CONFIGURATION: Feature flags configuration
🔧 CONFIGURATION: Limits configuration (basket, order sizes)
🔧 CONFIGURATION: Validation options
⚡ PERFORMANCE: Validation result caching
⚡ PERFORMANCE: Optimized basket operations
⚡ PERFORMANCE: Efficient order splitting algorithm
🛡️ SECURITY: Enhanced validation and sanitization
🛡️ SECURITY: Product-feature compatibility enforcement
Breaking: This is a greenfield implementation - no backward compatibility with v1.0.1 required
Initial release
HTTP Basic Authentication with API Key (UUID format)
Account number padding support (10-digit Australia Post, 8-digit StarTrack)
Two-step label generation (create shipment, then create labels)
Synchronous label generation for <250 parcels
Rate limiting for tracking API (10 requests/60 seconds)
Token bucket rate limiter with automatic waiting
Rate calculation for domestic and international shipments
Real-time tracking with event history
Shipment void/refund support
JSON request/response format
Comprehensive error handling with error code parsing
Exponential backoff retry logic
Australia Post backoff policy implementation
International customs support
Pickup scheduling support
Dangerous goods support
Insurance and signature options
10+ service codes supported
Thread-safe rate limiting
Connection pooling for performance
